title: EasyCrafts
description: Create custom crafting recipes with full NBT preservation through a beautiful drag-and-drop GUI—no commands, no YAML editing, just drag items and click save.
body:
# EasyCrafts ### The Ultimate Custom Recipe Solution **Create custom crafting recipes with a beautiful drag-and-drop interface** [![Spigot](https://img.shields.io/badge/Spigot-Compatible-orange?style=for-the-badge&logo=minecraft)](https://www.spigotmc.org/) [![Paper](https://img.shields.io/badge/Paper-Compatible-00ADD8?style=for-the-badge&logo=minecraft)](https://papermc.io/) [![Bukkit](https://img.shields.io/badge/Bukkit-Compatible-yellow?style=for-the-badge&logo=minecraft)](https://dev.bukkit.org/) [![Folia](https://img.shields.io/badge/Folia-Compatible-green?style=for-the-badge&logo=minecraft)](https://papermc.io/software/folia) ---
## What is EasyCrafts? EasyCrafts lets you create custom crafting recipes with any items—including custom names, enchantments, and NBT data—through an elegant golden GUI that makes recipe management effortless. Stop wrestling with configuration files and complex commands. EasyCrafts gives you an intuitive drag-and-drop interface that works exactly like a crafting table. If you can craft items, you can create recipes. --- ## Why You'll Love It **No more YAML editing.** Open the GUI, drag items into a 3x3 grid, drag your output item into the result slot, and click save. Your recipe is live instantly—no server restart required. **Perfect metadata preservation.** That custom sword with Sharpness X, custom name, and lore? Players will get exactly that item. EasyCrafts preserves enchantments, custom names, lore, durability, custom model data, player skull textures, potion effects, and all NBT data. Nothing gets lost. **Flexible or strict matching.** By default, recipes accept any item of the same type. Place a diamond sword in your recipe? Players can use any diamond sword to craft. Need exact matches? Toggle strict mode to require specific names, enchantments, or metadata. **Powerful management system.** The recipe manager displays all your recipes as their actual output items with full metadata visible. Click any recipe to edit it—move items around, change outputs, update settings. Shift-click to delete. Everything updates instantly with no commands or file editing needed. --- ## Key Features **Intuitive Interface** - Beautiful golden menus with clean layouts make recipe creation feel premium and professional. **Complete Item Support** - Works with vanilla items, custom items, player heads, items with custom model data, enchanted gear, potions, dyed armor, written books, and any item with NBT data. **Smart Recipe Matching** - Choose between flexible matching (material type only) or strict matching (exact item required) per recipe. **Live Editing** - Create, modify, and delete recipes while your server is running. Changes apply immediately. **Autocrafter Compatible** - Custom recipes work automatically with vanilla autocrafters on supported versions. **Zero Performance Impact** - Efficient caching and async operations mean no lag, even with hundreds of recipes. **Simple Permissions** - Just two permissions: one for admins to manage recipes, one for players to craft them. --- ## Perfect For **RPG Servers** - Create legendary weapons and armor with custom enchantments and lore that players craft through progression systems. **Economy Servers** - Design custom currency items or unique tradeable goods that integrate with your economy plugins. **Creative Servers** - Build custom items with resource pack integration using custom model data that players can craft themselves. **Survival Servers** - Add quality-of-life recipes or custom gear progression without breaking vanilla balance. **PvP Servers** - Control gear availability through crafting with strict mode requiring specific token items for powerful equipment. ---
